hypothesis: Equipping the autonomous multi-agent materials characterization system with a persistent, structured semantic-episodic memory module will improve generalization to unseen zeolite/topology structures and adsorbates, resulting in a statistically significant increase in autonomous simulation setup success rate and force-field extraction IoU on a held-out test set (p<0.05) compared to a memoryless baseline, especially for multi-structure and multi-adsorbate scenarios.
